name: Market Signal Desk
description: Proposal template for tracking stocks, macro signals, company news, and investor vibe so users know what deserves attention right now.
author: ClawMax Team

communities.name: Market Signals
communities.description: Shared coordination space for market trends, stock watchlists, and investor sentiment.

groups.name: Markets
groups.description: Macro trends, sectors, and cross-market moves.

groups.name: Companies
groups.description: Company-specific news, earnings, and stock catalysts.

groups.name: Sentiment
groups.description: Retail vibe, community chatter, and noisy signals to interpret carefully.

groups.name: Status
groups.description: Current attention list, risks, and watch priorities.

agents.name: Desk Lead
agents.role: Market lead — defines the watchlist, risk lens, and final attention memo.

agents.name: Market Analyst
agents.role: Trend specialist — tracks sectors, indices, macro changes, and what actually matters.

agents.name: Company Tracker
agents.role: Company specialist — follows earnings, product moves, leadership changes, and stock-specific catalysts.

agents.name: Sentiment Watcher
agents.role: Sentiment specialist — reviews retail discussion, community vibe, and market narrative without treating it as truth.

workflows.name: Market Attention Kickoff
workflows.content:
# Market Attention Kickoff

You are the Desk Lead.

## Project Configuration
> **Customize these before applying:**

- **Watchlist or sector:** [tickers, themes, sector, custom]
- **Time horizon:** [today, this week, this month]
- **Risk style:** [conservative, balanced, aggressive]
- **Priority lens:** [news, catalysts, sentiment, macro, all]
- **Output artifact:** [watch note, daily digest, investor memo]

## Your Tasks
1. Restate the watchlist and time horizon
2. Ask Market Analysts for the biggest trend shifts
3. Ask Company Tracker for the highest-signal company developments
4. Ask Sentiment Watcher for retail narrative worth noticing or ignoring
5. Post the current attention list to Status

workflows.name: Market Signal Digest
workflows.content:
# Market Signal Digest

1. Summarize the strongest company or stock-specific developments
2. Note which moves are signal versus noise
3. Connect news to likely investor attention over the chosen time horizon
4. Post the company digest to Companies and the top actions to Status
